title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen from Settings for both updates
scenario: Verify the new unified DFU screen appears in Settings when both Osprey EB and CC have updates available, replacing the old separate update sections.
steps: Start app with Osprey EB and CC (both at least version 5039) with updates available for both.
Navigate to Fab/Settings/SW update and open it.
Verify the new DFU screen design appears, showing all updates for the user to choose from (e.g., Emu for EB, Flamingo for EB and CC).
expected: New DFU screen design appears, showing all updates for the user to choose from (e.g., Emu for EB, Flamingo for EB and CC). The new design replaces the old layout which had separate update sections, buttons, release notes, and device images for EB, CC, and all.
